5 Best Free Online Tools for Work

In 2026, there is no need to download heavy desktop software for simple tasks. Here are our top absolute must-bookmark browser utilities:

  1. Tooleva Percentage Calculator - Figure out tips and discounts in seconds.
  2. Tooleva PDF Compressor - Shrink your resume safely using client-side processing.
  3. Tooleva Image Resizer - Adjust your profile picture dimensions perfectly.
  4. Word Counter - Keep your emails concise.
  5. PDF Merger - Combine scattered documents securely into one.

Explore all these and more securely at Tooleva!
